name: betynz-web
description: Betynz free-access launch with all 18 engines unlocked, secure Supabase password and Google sign-in, adult profile enforcement, saved picks and synced preferences. Payment features are intentionally disabled for later activation.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check backend-client.js && node --check rebel-engine-core.js && node --check olympian-engine-core.js && node --check scripts/seed-guard.js && node --check scripts/fetch-data.js && node --check scripts/select-enrichment-plan.js && node --check scripts/merge-enriched-data.js && node --check scripts/enrich-xg.js && node --check scripts/enrich-rebel-odds.js && node --check scripts/build-snapshot.js && node --check scripts/build-dist.js && npm run test:rebels && npm run validate
scripts.test:rebels: node tests/rebel-engine-tests.js && node tests/rebel-goal-correction-tests.js && node tests/universal-gg-rule-tests.js
